title: Complete Guide to BIR TRAIN Law Withholding Tax in 2024
excerpt: Everything Philippine employers need to know about computing withholding tax under the TRAIN Law — updated tax tables, exemptions, and BIR Form 2316 filing.

title: SSS Contribution Table 2024: What Employers Must Know
excerpt: The SSS contribution rate increased to 14% in 2024. Here's the complete contribution table, how to compute employee and employer shares, and how to file the R3 report.

title: PhilHealth 5% Premium Rate: A Practical Employer Guide
excerpt: PhilHealth's 5% premium rate is now in full effect under Circular 2023-0009. Learn how to compute contributions, generate the RF-1 report, and avoid penalties.

title: PH Labor Code: Overtime, Holiday Pay, and Night Differential Rates
excerpt: A comprehensive breakdown of Philippine Labor Code overtime rates for regular days, rest days, regular holidays, and special non-working holidays — with sample computations.

title: 13th Month Pay in the Philippines: How to Compute It Correctly
excerpt: Presidential Decree 851 mandates 13th month pay for all rank-and-file employees. Learn the correct formula, pro-rated computations, and tax exemption rules under TRAIN Law.

title: RA 10173: Data Privacy Act Compliance for HR Departments
excerpt: Philippine HR departments handle sensitive employee data daily. Here's how to stay compliant with the Data Privacy Act of 2012 — from 201 file management to consent forms.
